contracts.notes: Canonical workspace contracts were redefined under packages/contracts for events, policies, modes, sessions, and capability manifests.

config-core.notes: Config precedence, prompt-section layering, and mode overlays were rebuilt inside packages/config-core.

session-store.notes: Session persistence, checkpointing, and resumable state live in packages/session-store under .unclecode state conventions.

context-broker.notes: Repo-map and research packet assembly were rebuilt from public reference patterns without retaining vendored runtime coupling.

policy-engine.notes: Approval intents, trust zones, and deterministic policy outcomes were rebuilt as a first-class package.

providers-auth.notes: Provider selection plus OpenAI OAuth/device flows were implemented against documented APIs for UncleCode-specific auth handling.

runtime-broker.notes: Local runtime execution and sandbox escalation boundaries were rebuilt behind packages/runtime-broker.

mcp-host.notes: MCP registry merge, trust tiers, and governed profile startup were implemented from capability-governance requirements.

orchestrator-research.notes: Research mode, bounded orchestration, and replayable task flows were rebuilt from inspiration-only public references.

tui.notes: The session-center TUI, shell state reducer, and UncleCode HUD are new Ink-based UI surfaces for this repo.

cli-release-surface.notes: The root bin, CLI command router, docs, and operational surfaces now expose UncleCode as the primary product identity.
